SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.rupture

Class PipeFireRuptureStudy

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.rupture.PipeFireRuptureStudy
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class PipeFireRuptureStudy extends Object implements Serializable
Blowdown pipe fire-rupture strain-rate study.

The study implements the calculation structure used by legacy fire-rupture spreadsheets for pipes exposed to fire while a blowdown pressure profile is supplied externally. It couples pipe heat-up, pressure stress, temperature-dependent material properties, a Sellars-Tegart strain-rate law, accumulated strain, and spreadsheet-style release estimates.

This model is intended for screening and agent workflows where pipe data may be gathered from source documents and piping specifications, then reviewed by an engineer before the calculation is run. Formal safety studies should verify the material basis, pressure profile, segment inventory, and release modelling.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

    • PipeFireRuptureStudy

      private PipeFireRuptureStudy(PipeFireRuptureStudy.Builder builder)
      Creates a pipe fire-rupture study.
      Parameters:
      builder - populated builder

  • Method Details

    • builder

      public static PipeFireRuptureStudy.Builder builder(PipeFireRuptureInput input, PipeFireRuptureMaterial material, PipeFireRuptureScenario scenario, BlowdownPressureProfile pressureProfile)
      Creates a builder for a pipe fire-rupture study.
      Parameters:
      input - pipe geometry and fluid input
      material - material property curve
      scenario - fire exposure scenario
      pressureProfile - blowdown pressure profile
      Returns:
      new study builder

    • run

      public PipeFireRuptureResult run()
      Runs the fire-rupture study.
      Returns:
      calculation result with time series and release estimate

    • addInputWarnings

      private void addInputWarnings(PipeFireRuptureResult.Builder result)
      Adds input warnings to the result.
      Parameters:
      result - result builder

    • addRecommendations

      private void addRecommendations(PipeFireRuptureResult.Builder result, boolean rupturePredicted)
      Adds engineering recommendations to the result.
      Parameters:
      result - result builder
      rupturePredicted - true when rupture was predicted

    • thermalMassJPerK

      private double thermalMassJPerK(double pressureBarg, double meanWallTemperatureC, double wallHeatCapacityJPerKgK)
      Calculates the thermal mass used for the next heat-up step.
      Parameters:
      pressureBarg - pressure for the next row in barg
      meanWallTemperatureC - current mean wall temperature in degrees Celsius
      wallHeatCapacityJPerKgK - wall heat capacity in J/kg-K
      Returns:
      thermal mass in J/K

    • pipeState

      private PipeFireRuptureStudy.PipeState pipeState(double accumulatedStrain)
      Calculates pipe dimensions after accumulated strain.
      Parameters:
      accumulatedStrain - accumulated effective strain
      Returns:
      pipe state

    • vonMisesStressMPa

      private static double vonMisesStressMPa(double pressureBarg, double outsideDiameterM, double insideDiameterM, double weightStressMPa)
      Calculates von Mises stress using the spreadsheet thick-wall expressions.
      Parameters:
      pressureBarg - pipe internal gauge pressure in barg
      outsideDiameterM - current outside diameter in m
      insideDiameterM - current inside diameter in m
      weightStressMPa - axial weight stress in MPa
      Returns:
      von Mises stress in MPa

    • releaseEstimate

      private PipeFireRuptureResult.ReleaseEstimate releaseEstimate(Double pressureBarg)
      Calculates the spreadsheet-style release estimate at rupture.
      Parameters:
      pressureBarg - rupture pressure in barg, or null if no rupture was predicted
      Returns:
      release estimate

    • validatePositive

      private static void validatePositive(double value, String name)
      Validates a positive finite value.
      Parameters:
      value - value to validate
      name - parameter name for messages
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the value is invalid
